name: vayyl
description: Vayyl monorepo dev launcher — starts the DApp + backend services together for local testnet work.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n indexer,relayer,frontend -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm --dir backend/indexer dev" "pnpm --dir backend/relayer dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -k -n indexer,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --dir backend/indexer dev" "pnpm --dir frontend dev"
